channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Micron hits $1 trillion market cap for the first time as stock surges 18%
item.description: A global memory shortage driven by AI is spiking demand for chipmakers like Micron.

item.title: Trump to host Cabinet meeting at Camp David on Wednesday as Iran talks continue
item.description: Trump and his top officials will make the rare trip to the woodsy Maryland retreat to discuss issues both foreign and domestic, a White House official said.

item.title: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes
item.description: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.

item.title: Judges block Alabama redistricting maps that would dilute Black vote in midterms
item.description: A three-judge panel found that the 2023 congressional district maps adopted by Alabama intentionally discriminated against Black voters.

item.title: U.S. conducts 'self-defense strikes' in Iran as Trump pushes for peace deal
item.description: Targets included missile launch sites and Iranian boats attempting to emplace mines.

item.title: The Avis 'circus' messed with the transports sector this year. Josh Brown finds the real Best Stocks in the space
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo take a look at some of the transportation names in their Best Stocks list.

item.title: BP shares fall after board removes chairman Albert Manifold over 'serious’ conduct concerns
item.description: The board of British energy major BP on Tuesday announced it had unanimously decided to remove Chairman Albert Manifold with immediate effect.

item.title: Brent oil jumps back above $100 after Iran vows to retaliate for U.S. strikes
item.description: President Trump earlier said talks with Iran were "proceeding nicely," while warning that the U.S. could resume military action if discussions were to collapse.

item.title: Wells Fargo to offer mortgage incentives on 3D printed homes with Icon
item.description: Wells Fargo will provide a 50 basis point lender credit to buyers of Icon homes using its mortgages.

item.title: ‘The market has spoken’: Ferrari shares fall after carmaker unveils first fully electric vehicle
item.description: Shares of luxury carmaker Ferrari fell sharply on Tuesday morning, shortly after the company launched its first fully electric vehicle.

item.title: Barriers grow for international students seeking U.S. jobs: The 'American dream ... is collapsing'
item.description: International graduates say a weak hiring market and changing immigration rules make it harder for them to achieve their American dream of working in the U.S.

item.title: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
item.description: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.

item.title: A defense stock down big lately is primed for a turnaround. How to play a comeback with less risk
item.description: Northrop Grumman has suffered an eye-popping 30% collapse in under two months.

item.title: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston to step down after 19 years at helm of cloud storage pioneer
item.description: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston, who started the cloud storage company when he was 24, plans to step down and assume the role of executive chairman.

item.title: 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' is Disney's lowest-ever Star Wars film opening
item.description: Disney's "The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied and estimated $82 million in domestic ticket sales through its first three days in theaters.

item.title: Pentagon spars with SpaceX over Starlink price hike during Iran war: Reuters
item.description: The disagreement over Starlink's use on LUCAS suicide drones is part of increasing tensions between SpaceX and the Pentagon over pricing in recent months.

item.title: Eli Lilly stock edges higher as company plans nearly $4 billion in vaccine deals
item.description: The deals are part of Eli Lilly’s effort to expand into infectious disease research and development.

item.title: 'I never heard of the Strait of Hormuz before this': How one medical supply CEO is navigating the oil price shock
item.description: Medical supply company Gentell sources raw materials from around the world, and the crisis at the Strait of Hormuz is causing volatility for its business.

item.title: ECB 'will do what is necessary' to tame inflation, Bank of France governor tells CNBC
item.description: Markets are overwhelmingly pricing in a rate hike from the central bank at its next meeting.

item.title: We're booking profits in a stock that has rallied almost 10% since our last buy
item.description: The stock has made a nice move over the past week.

item.title: Investors ‘afraid’ to take position on oil, data chiefs say as tankers face potential Hormuz fees
item.description: Oil markets fear Iran may impose fees on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz as part of any peace deal with the U.S.

item.title: The best roadside assistance plans of 2026
item.description: From joining AAA to getting a car warranty, here's how you can get help with your car in a pinch.

item.title: Russia tells Marco Rubio U.S. citizens should leave Kyiv ahead of 'systematic' strikes on Ukrainian capital
item.description: Moscow said it would be launching “systematic and consistent strikes” on the city of Kyiv.

item.title: ‘A very dangerous bluff’: Mark Carney warns of Brexit-like regret if Alberta leaves Canada
item.description: The Canadian prime minister led the Bank of England when the U.K. left the European Union in 2020.

item.title: Huawei plans new smartphone chips this fall as rivalry with Nvidia and Apple heats up
item.description: Chinese telecom giant Huawei announced Monday a new way of designing chips that improves their capabilities, despite U.S. restrictions on the company.

item.title: When are prediction markets most helpful? Evercore ISI has a formula
item.description: Evercore ISI strategists provide insight for when prediction markets are useful for forecasting.

item.title: UK gilt yields retreat from multi-decade highs as political drama mellows, rate hike expectations ease
item.description: As bond markets returned from a bank holiday on Tuesday morning, the yield on the benchmark 10-year bond stood at 4.85%.

item.title: Move over, seltzer. Non-carbonated drinks are taking the spotlight
item.description: Non-carbonated alcoholic drinks like Surfside and BeatBox are stealing "share of throat" from hard seltzers, particularly among Gen Z.

item.title: ‘Blue dot fever’? What's really behind a tricky summer dynamic for live music
item.description: As prices rise everywhere, consumers are choosing to be more intentional with how they're spending on live music and concerts this year.

item.title: Qualcomm's stock pop shows investors are 'waking up' to boom in AI devices
item.description: Qualcomm is on a big run, powered by investor bullishness that the company will be at the center of a boom in AI devices.
